_comment: Hand-maintained record of OBR Economic & Fiscal Outlook headline figures, one entry per OBR publication. The adapter's live `fetch()` emits the head-of-list (newest) entry; `fetchHistorical()` emits one observation per vintage inside the requested range so backfilled days carry the right cb_headroom / psnfl_trajectory through to the next vintage. Values are nominal GBP billions for headroom and percentage points of GDP for psnfl trajectory. Update whenever OBR publishes (twice yearly + any in-year update). TODO(source): swap for OBR's headline-data CSV ingest once OBR exposes one at a stable URL.
